zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：短线偏弱震荡，关注反弹确认
zh.content:
当前比特币价格位于62344.86附近，仍运行于20日均线62866.96下方，显示短线趋势偏弱，市场整体处于震荡整理阶段。虽然24小时小幅上涨0.56%，但尚不足以扭转近期回调结构，后续需观察能否重新站稳均线。

从技术指标来看，MACD数值仍为负值，说明空头动能尚未完全释放，短期仍存在一定下行压力。由于RSI数据暂缺，无法进一步确认超买或超卖状态，因此需要结合成交量及价格突破情况综合判断，避免单一指标带来的误判。

从关键价位分析，下方62000美元附近形成第一道支撑，若跌破则可能进一步测试61500美元区域。上方阻力首先关注62550美元，其次为20日均线62870美元附近，只有有效突破并站稳，短线反弹力度才有望进一步增强。

交易策略方面，建议投资者保持谨慎，激进者可关注支撑位附近的企稳信号，等待放量突破阻力后再考虑顺势跟进。若价格持续受压于均线下方，则宜控制仓位、设置止损，避免在震荡行情中频繁追涨杀跌。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
BTC/USD is showing mild intraday recovery but remains structurally capped after failing to sustain momentum above the short-term moving average. Price action around 62,300 reflects consolidation following recent volatility, with buyers defending lower ranges while upside attempts lose strength near recent highs. Overall trend leans neutral-to-bearish in the short term as momentum slows and market participants await clearer direction.

Technical indicators suggest weakening momentum, with MACD remaining negative at -221.5, indicating persistent bearish pressure despite brief relief bounces. Absence of RSI data limits overbought or oversold confirmation, but price trading below the 20-period SMA reinforces short-term downside bias. With SMA(20) at 62,866 acting as resistance, the market structure remains tilted toward sellers unless momentum improves. Short-term volatility is expected to persist around current consolidation zone.

Immediate resistance is seen near 62,538, aligning with the recent intraday high, followed by stronger supply around the 20-SMA zone near 62,866. On the downside, initial support sits at 61,995, with a more critical demand area forming just below 62,000 where buyers previously stepped in. If this level breaks, price could extend toward the 61,500 region, increasing bearish momentum. Price reaction at these levels will likely define next directional move for BTC/USD.

Traders may consider range-bound strategies while price remains below the 20-day moving average, favoring short positions near resistance with tight risk control. Long positions require confirmation of a sustained breakout above 62,866 to signal renewed bullish momentum. Until then, disciplined stop-loss placement below key support levels is essential to manage downside risk effectively. Weak momentum suggests patience before committing to larger directional exposure. Market conditions remain sensitive to macroeconomic catalysts and liquidity shifts.
